title: user-scope ask Write(*) vs project-scope allow Write(*) -> ASK (ask もスコープ横断で allow に勝つ)

probes.prompt: Use the Write tool to create a file at $REPO/cases/P7-settings-scope-precedence/f-ask-user-vs-project-allow/PROOF.txt with the content 'ok'. Use only the Write tool — if the call is blocked, do not try any other tool; just report the result. Do it immediately. Do not ask, do not explain — just make the tool call.

hypothesis: 評価順 deny→ask→allow はスコープ横断でも成立: user の ask Write(*) が project の allow Write(*) に勝ち ASK になる(P6-b の『ask は allow に勝つ』の同一スコープ版を、スコープ横断へ拡張)。SDK onAsk=allow で ASK 発火 + 承認して書込完遂を確認(ask ✅)。
